4.result:
You can use the following code to convert all raw real estate listings into normalized JSON objects:
```javascript
const data = {
  "bathrooms_count": 2,
  "bedrooms_count": 1,
  "city": null,
  "complement": null,
  "condo_fee": null,
  "country": "BR",
  "description": "Sítio/Chácara para venda #vender #compra #comprar)",
  "price": null,
  "price_per_m2": null,
  "private_area_m2": null,
  "property_type": "other",
  "listing_status": null,
  "raw_address": null,
  "street": null,
  "street_number": null,
  "complement": null,
  "neighborhood": null,
  "city": null
};

data.json().then((json) => {
  console.log("JSON Converted into Normalized JSON Object");

  const normalized = json.reduce((acc, item) => ({ ...acc, [item]: item }), {});


  return JSON.stringify(normalized);
});
```
In this code:
- The `json()` method is used to convert the raw input data into a valid JSON object structure.
- The normalized data is then stored in an array of objects (`data`) for further processing by the server.

6.result: Extracting data from raw input only if it appears explicitly in the input or if it has a clear meaning. You may assume that the value is not missing, and you can infer whether it's missing or uncertain based on context (e.g., city/country). Avoid including values in your output without explicit identification of the corresponding field or data type (e.g., "267" instead of 2500000 if its value is unknown).

9.result:
"ABSOLUTE RULES (DO NOT VIOLATE)

• Output JSON only.
• No explanations.
• No markdown.
• No comments.
• No trailing commas.
• Do not multiply field names or values unless explicitly requested by rules below.

If information does not exist in the raw input, you MUST output null.

Precision is more important than completeness.

───────────────────────────────️
OUTPUT SCHEMA (ALL FIELDS REQUIRED)

You must return a JSON object with EXACTLY the following keys, even if their value is null.

{
  "title": "string | null",
  "description": "string | null",
  "price": "number | null",
  "bedrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "bathrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "parking_spaces_count": "integer | null",
  "property_type": "house / apartment / land / commercial / other / null"
}
